case_title: IBRAHIM DISU VS. BRANDON SAMUEL HOWARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: WILLIAMS, SANDRA IS NO LONGER ASSIGNEE
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR DISU, IBRAHIM ASSIGNED TO WILLIAMS, SANDRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA FUSING. PLAINTIFF IBRAHIM DISU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANDON SAMUEL HOWARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SELINA M. RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT SELINA M. RODRIGUEZ. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS DEFENDANT SELINA M. RODRIGUEZ TO MOVE FORWARD FOR TRIAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $95.63 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, BRANDON SAMUEL RODRIGUEZ, SELINA M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,860.00 FILED BY DISU, IBRAHIM AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, BRANDON SAMUEL RODRIGUEZ, SELINA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED AUG-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, BRANDON SAMUEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISU, IBRAHIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD, BRANDON SAMUEL $1,860.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,950.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE WILLIAMS, SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, BRANDON SAMUEL RODRIGUEZ, SELINA M.
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE WILLIAMS, SANDRA AS TO PLAINTIFF DISU, IBRAHIM
